title: How We Cut Our AWS Bill by 32% Without Sacrificing Performance
summary: A step-by-step breakdown of the tooling and strategies we used to save $240k annually on cloud infrastructure.

title: Identity Governance & Entra ID Security Engine
summary: Enterprise-grade Identity Governance utility that automates Entra ID hygiene by auditing and providing instant remediation scripts.
impact: Recapture a share of the $30B lost annually to 'ghost' licenses by automating the detection of stale, over-privileged, and leak-prone accounts

title: Infrastructure Cost Optimizer
summary: ML-powered tool that analyzes AWS spending patterns and automatically right-sizes instances, saving 32% on monthly cloud bills.
impact: Saved 32% on cloud spend — $240k annually across 3 business units

title: K-VQG: Multimodal AI Knowledge Extraction & VQG
summary: Automated pipeline integrating GPT-V & Seq2Seq to transform visual data into structured, knowledge-based insights & questions.
impact: Optimized inference reliability via 2-shot learning, achieving a 90.7% semantic similarity score

title: Tale Tailor: Distributed State & Collaboration Engine
summary: Cloud-integrated utility automating state synchronization and data durability for asynchronous, distributed user workflows.
impact: Ensured 100% data persistence and eliminated sync latency by architecting a hybrid storage layer with automated, event-driven state transitions

title: XP: CI/CD-Driven Distributed Transaction Engine
summary: Automated transaction system utilizing XP principles, CI pipelines, and batch processing for distributed data consistency.
impact: Accelerated release velocity through automated CI/CD pipelines while ensuring 100% data integrity via overnight batch synchronization.
